zh.Dom Von Altenberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen,: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海尼-吉設 可萊斯奧登塔爾阿爾騰格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha von Geldern於1154年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Heinrich I. von Geldern37歲，母親Agnes von Arnstein35歲。她於1175年之前與Engelbert I. von Berg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1185年之後，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海尼-吉設 可萊斯奧登塔爾阿爾騰格。

zh-hans.Dom Von Altenberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen,: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海尼-吉設 可萊斯奧登塔爾阿爾騰格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha von Geldern于1154年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Heinrich I. von Geldern37岁，母亲Agnes von Arnstein35岁。她于1175年之前与Engelbert I. von Berg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1185年之后，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海尼-吉設 可萊斯奧登塔爾阿爾騰格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha von Geldern was born in 1154, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Heinrich I. von Geldern, was 37 and her mother, Agnes von Arnstein, was 35. She married Engelbert I. von Berg before 1175. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1185, and was buried in Altenberg, Odenthal, Rheinisch-Bergischer Kreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

Elle a épousé Engelbert I. von Berg avant 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1185, et a été enterrée à Altenberg, Odenthal, Rheinisch-Bergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha von Geldern 1154 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I. von Geldern 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Arnstein 35. Sie hat vor 1175 Engelbert I. von Berg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha von Geldern è nata il nel 1154 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Heinrich I. von Geldern, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Arnstein, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Engelbert I. von Berg prima del 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1185, e fu sepolta a Altenberg, Odenthal, Rheinisch-Bergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha von Geldernが1154年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Heinrich I. von Geldernは37歳，母Agnes von Arnsteinは35歳であった。1175年以前にEngelbert I. von Bergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1185年以後に死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンルヘイニスチ-バージッシャー クレイスオデンサルアルテンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Dom Von Altenberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen,: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 리이니슈-버지슈어 크레이스 오덴솔 알텐버그
ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha von Geldern(이)가 1154년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I. von Geldern(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Arnstein(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1175년 이전 Engelbert I. von Berg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 이후 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 리이니슈-버지슈어 크레이스 오덴솔 알텐버그에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Engelbert I. von Berg antes 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha von Geldern родилась в 1154 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Heinrich I. von Geldern было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Arnstein, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Engelbert I. von Berg перед 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1185 г. и была похоронена в местности алтенбирг, одентэл, раинищ-биргищир крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.
